fix_diff:
diff --git a/self_maintenance_loop_runner.py b/self_maintenance_loop_runner.py
-label = os.environ.get("MODSTORE_PARA_AGENT_LAUNCHD_LABEL", "com.xcmax.para-main-agent")
+label = os.environ.get("MODSTORE_PARA_AGENT_LAUNCHD_LABEL", "com.xcmax.para-main-agent.watchdog")

launchctl bootout/disable com.xcmax.para-main-agent
keep only com.xcmax.para-main-agent.watchdog running one e2e-agent process
root_cause: Two launchd jobs started e2e-agent with the same device token, so each WebSocket connection replaced the other and tasks were not reliably delivered.
symptom: Para task stays running with only waiting-dispatch log; e2e-agent repeatedly online/disconnected
